metadata.title: AI Review Dashboard
metadata.description: A local tool that lets AI review your PRs and apply only the valuable findings to GitHub.

auth.bannerTitle: You are not signed in to GitHub
auth.bannerBody: Run gh auth login in your terminal, then reload this page.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Adjust the review prompt and model

pulls.title: Open pull requests
pulls.noOpenDescription: This repository currently has no open PRs available for review.

review.noIssuesDescription: The AI found no issues worth applying to these changes.
review.idleDescription: Press “Run review” to have the AI analyze the PR and generate findings.
review.invalidReason: {filePath}:{line} is not part of the PR diff, so an inline comment cannot be posted.

toast.submittedDescription: You can check them on GitHub

settingsForm.modelDescription: The Claude model used for reviews. Reuses your local Claude Code authentication.
settingsForm.promptDescription: Describe freely what to review and from which perspective. It is injected into the system instructions when a review runs.
settingsForm.promptPlaceholder: Describe what to focus on in reviews…
